rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §38.053 governs parental consent for school-based health center services. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: A school-based health center may provide services to a student only if the district or the provider with whom the district contracts obtains the written consent of the student's parent or guardian
_note: No relationship between the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase and Educ. Code §38.053 parental consent requirements.
